name: Rolled Orange Sponge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Line a jelly roll pan, measuring 15½ inches by 10½ inches by 1 inch, with waxed paper.
2. In a medium bowl, beat all 7 egg whites on medium speed until soft peaks form; set aside.
3. In a large bowl, beat the egg yolks until thick and light. Add the orange zest and salt, then beat to combine.
4. Gradually stir in the cake flour, mixing well. Stir one-fourth of the beaten egg whites into the batter; fold in the remaining whites.
5. Evenly spread the batter into the prepared pan. Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown and the top springs back when lightly touched with a finger.
6. Invert the cake onto a clean dish towel dusted with confectioners' sugar. Remove the waxed paper.
7. Starting at the narrow end, roll up the cake with the dish towel. Transfer the rolled cake to a rack and let cool.
8. Unroll the cake and spread the orange spreadable fruit evenly over it. Roll up the cake again, seam side down, and sprinkle with confectioners' sugar.
